title: [Skyship, Living Corridor]
description: The corridor widens slightly here into an oval shape and the smell of sweet smoke lingers in the air.  In the oval's center, a stone fire pit is placed on top of the metal floor.  Ash and charred bits of wood litter the pit, which is further cluttered by organic debris.  Open-topped empty wooden barrels and wooden crates line the bulkheads.  Above these containers, dried meats and cloth sacks hang from metal hooks attached to the bulkheads.
